title: Sweet Little Fairy,
content:
Sweet little fairy,
    Tender and airy,
    Come, let us dance on the good baby-eyes;
    Merrily skipping,
    Cheerily tripping,
    Murmur we ever our soft lullabies.
meaning:
"Sweet Little Fairy," is a quintessential example of Eugene Field's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
